overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character in medieval attire sneaking through dense coastal vegetation overlooking a misty shipyard with wooden scaffolding and a vessel under construction. The scene transitions from close-up bush navigation to a panoramic view of the harbor construction site as the character descends and exits the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal hillside with dense shrubbery overlooking shipyard

agents.ego_description: crouching and moving slowly through dense bushes on a hillside overlooking the harbor

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the frame
thick green shrubs and bushes that the character is moving through
tall wooden construction tower with cross-bracing in the shipyard
large wooden vessel with tall mast structure being built in the harbor
calm sea with foggy atmosphere in the background
dense pine trees covering the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The character crouches through dense coastal vegetation on a hillside, with a stone wall running along the left and a misty shipyard visible in the distance. The atmosphere is cool and overcast, with wooden scaffolding and a partially built ship visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hill edge overlooking shipyard construction

events.description: character transitions from crouching to prone and begins descending the steep hillside toward the shipyard

agents.ego_description: moving down the hillside through sparser vegetation, transitioning to a prone position as the slope steepens

entered.detail: tall wooden crane with ladder structure on the right side of the shipyard
mossy grass-covered slope on the right side of the frame
dirt and wooden plank ground of the active construction site

segments.scene_description: The character descends the hillside as the vegetation clears, revealing more of the shipyard below. The wooden scaffolding and ship become more prominent in the frame as the character moves toward the edge of the slope and begins to go prone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shipyard construction site with wooden cranes and scaffolding

events.description: character exits the frame and camera continues panning right across the shipyard
slight darkening as camera pans toward the mistier eastern section of the harbor

agents.ego_description: camera pans across the shipyard construction site after the character has moved out of view, surveying the wooden structures and vessel

entered.detail: multiple wooden crane towers and derrick structures on the right side of the shipyard

segments.scene_description: With the character no longer in frame, the camera pans across the expansive shipyard construction site, revealing multiple wooden cranes, scaffolding towers, and the large vessel under construction. The view opens up to show the full scope of the harbor works against the misty ocean backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a concealed position in dense coastal brush to a wide, panoramic reveal of a misty shipyard. It begins with a hooded character crouching through thick vegetation beside a stone wall, with the distant outlines of wooden scaffolding visible through a cool, overcast haze. As the character descends the hillside, the foliage clears and the ship under construction becomes more prominent in the frame before the character drops prone and exits the view. The scene then expands into a sweeping pan across the expansive harbor, revealing a complex network of wooden cranes and scaffolding towers. Finally, the view opens fully to showcase the massive scale of the vessel and the surrounding construction works against the backdrop of a misty ocean.
